_comment: Real-clip format matrix consumed by the backend coverage tests. Generated by tools/gen_clip_matrix.sh and stored via Git LFS (see .gitattributes). The plain-text mirror matrix.list is what the headless C++/ObjC++ tests parse (no JSON dependency in the test binaries); keep the two in sync. width/height/fps/frames are the expected decode results the coverage test asserts (dimensions exact; frame count within +/-1 GOP slack).
